E21.title: Drainage Restriction
E21.summary: The washer is detecting slow or blocked draining.
steps: Turn off and unplug the washer.
Open the service panel and clean the drain filter.
Check the drain hose for bends or clogs.
Run a rinse and spin cycle to verify draining.

E05.title: Temperature Sensor Fault
E05.summary: The refrigerator is receiving inconsistent readings from a cooling sensor.
steps: Power cycle the refrigerator for five minutes.
Confirm vents are not blocked by food containers.
Move the unit away from the wall for better airflow.
If the code returns, schedule service for sensor inspection.
